title: Domain Event
description: Schema for a domain event in an event-sourced or event-driven system following CloudEvents conventions.

type.description: Event type in reverse DNS notation.

source.description: Identifies the event producer (bounded context or service).

id.description: Unique identifier for this event occurrence (UUID recommended).

subject.description: Subject/entity identifier this event relates to (e.g., order ID).

datacontenttype.description: Content type of the data field.

dataschema.description: URI of the schema the data attribute conforms to.

data.description: Event payload. Schema depends on event type.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID for tracing requests across service boundaries.

causationId.description: ID of the command or event that caused this event.

aggregateId.description: Identifier of the domain aggregate this event belongs to.

aggregateType.description: Type of the domain aggregate (e.g., Order, Customer, Payment).

aggregateVersion.description: Optimistic concurrency version of the aggregate after this event.

metadata.description: Additional metadata (user ID, tenant ID, trace context, etc.).
